# Jerome Banks — Career Profile

> Senior Data Platform Engineer with deep expertise in Hadoop/Spark ecosystems, cloud data infrastructure, and open-source contributions. Apache Committer and founder of Brickhouse (Hive UDFs).

## Core Files
- [RESUME.md](RESUME.md): Full career index — experience, projects, skills summary, education
- [intent.md](intent.md): Career preferences, interests, what I'm not interested in, directional goals
- [skills.md](skills.md): Capability taxonomy with depth and recency signals

## Experience

- [experience/onyx-gsk.md](experience/onyx-gsk.md): Onyx GSK — Senior Data Platform Engineer (2023-07–present)
- [experience/apixio.md](experience/apixio.md): Apixio — Staff Software Engineer, Data Platform (2022-08–2023-07)
- [experience/tatari.md](experience/tatari.md): Tatari — Staff Data Platform Engineer (2021-02–2022-07)
- [experience/demandbase.md](experience/demandbase.md): Demandbase — Principal Big Data Engineer (2018-09–2021-02)
- [experience/jumpshot.md](experience/jumpshot.md): Jumpshot/Avast — Senior Software Engineer (2016-12–2018-08)
- [experience/stitchfix.md](experience/stitchfix.md): StitchFix — Data Platform Engineer, Algorithms & Analytics (2015-08–2016-10)
- [experience/ifwe.md](experience/ifwe.md): Tagged.com/if(we) — Senior Software Engineer, Analytics Infrastructure (2014-03–2015-07)
- [experience/klout.md](experience/klout.md): Klout — Senior Software Engineer (2011-09–2014-02)
- [experience/quantcast.md](experience/quantcast.md): Quantcast — Senior Software Engineer (2008-09–2011-09)
- [experience/pulse-veepers.md](experience/pulse-veepers.md): Pulse Entertainment/Veepers.com — Lead Java Developer (2007-05–2008-09)
- [experience/bea-plumtree.md](experience/bea-plumtree.md): BEA BID Division/Plumtree Software — Sr. Software Engineer (2004-10–2007-05)
- [experience/lawson.md](experience/lawson.md): Lawson Software — Technical Lead (2004-04–2004-10)
- [experience/cyanea.md](experience/cyanea.md): Cyanea Systems — Sr. Software Engineer (2002-03–2004-04)
- [experience/dicarta.md](experience/dicarta.md): diCarta — Sr. Staff Engineer (2000-06–2002-01)
- [experience/infoseek-go.md](experience/infoseek-go.md): Infoseek/Go.com/Disney Internet Group — Staff Engineer (1999-02–2000-03)
- [experience/bay-one.md](experience/bay-one.md): Bay One Technologies — Senior Software Engineer (1997-10–1999-02)
- [experience/axiologic.md](experience/axiologic.md): Axiologic Corporation (contractor) — NatWest, Deutsche-Morgan Grenfell, Citibank (1995-02–1997-10)
- [experience/lehman.md](experience/lehman.md): Lehman Brothers — Senior Programmer Analyst (1993-09–1995-02)
- [experience/ofi.md](experience/ofi.md): OFI Corp. — Software Engineer (1993-02–1993-09)
- [experience/timber-hill.md](experience/timber-hill.md): Timber Hill — Programmer/Analyst / Tech Lead (1991-09–1993-03)
- [experience/att.md](experience/att.md): AT&T — Consultant (1989-08–1991-10)

## Projects

- [projects/brickhouse.md](projects/brickhouse.md): Brickhouse — open-source Hive UDF library (github.com/klout/brickhouse)
- [projects/satisfaction.md](projects/satisfaction.md): Satisfaction — next-generation Hadoop batch scheduler (github.com/ifwe/satisfaction)

## Extensions
- [extensions/publications.md](extensions/publications.md): Acknowledged contributor on two published research papers — LASTA (KDD '14), Klout Topics (K-CAP '17)
- [extensions/patents.md](extensions/patents.md): Co-inventor on four granted US patents (application performance monitoring, Cyanea Systems/IBM) and one unissued patent filing (Klout, Inc.)
